issues.description: Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. Card effect places a Character at bottom of deck, which requires 'PlayFromHand' or a custom 'PlaceAtBottomOfDeck' action. 'Rest' means exhaust/flip a card, not deck placement.

Target scope 'ChooseOwnCharacter' is incorrect. Effect says 'Place up to 1 Character at the bottom of the owner's deck' — this should target a Character from hand or field being placed into deck, not just any own character. Scope should clarify source (hand vs. board).
maxCost constraint of 4 is not mentioned in card text. No cost restriction stated for the Character being placed.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Place up to 1 Character at the bottom of the owner's deck.
